tracks.meaning: a garment worn over other clothes for warmth or protection, typically having sleeves and fastenings
the fur, hair, or wool covering the body of an animal
a thin layer of a substance deposited or applied to a surface
a protective or therapeutic layer applied to the skin or body part
a layer of metal deposited on another metal surface through electroplating or similar process
a layer or application of paint or varnish applied to a surface
an outer covering or integument of an organism
to cover or provide a surface with a layer of material
a person's external appearance or manner adopted for a particular purpose
